data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Utilizes microservices to allow independent development and deployment of different features.

data.title: Cloud-First
data.description: Emphasis on cloud-based services and solutions across platforms.

data.title: Responsive Design
data.description: Ensures the website is accessible and usable on a variety of devices with different screen sizes.

data.title: API-Centric
data.description: Heavy reliance on APIs to connect and fetch data across Microsoft services.

data.title: Identity and Access Management
data.description: Integrated identity and access management solutions to protect resources.
